reapack.name: ResolveLink Panel.lua
reapack.desc: Unified control panel for all ResolveLink functions (Pure GFX)

reapack.name: ResolveLink Callback.lua
reapack.desc: Polls ResolveLink server for pending REAPER import jobs

reapack.name: ResolveLink Send to Resolve.lua
reapack.desc: Renders REAPER project and imports audio into DaVinci Resolve

reapack.name: ResolveLink Update Project.lua
reapack.desc: Syncs REAPER items to match DaVinci Resolve timeline cuts

reapack.name: ResolveLink Logger.lua
reapack.desc: Toggleable console logger for ResolveLink REAPER scripts

reapack.name: ResolveLink JSON.lua
reapack.desc: Shared JSON decoder module for ResolveLink REAPER scripts

reapack.name: ResolveLink Render Lib.lua
reapack.desc: Shared render config and import logic for ResolveLink REAPER scripts
